section_summaries.schools: This neighbourhood has great elementary schools, great secondary schools, elementary special programs, and secondary special programs. There are 8 public schools and 4 Catholic schools serving Victoria Manor - Jennings Gate. The special programs offered at local schools include International Baccalaureate, French Immersion, and Advanced Placement.
section_summaries.parks: Fun is easy to find at the parks here. Parks in Victoria Manor - Jennings Gate feature playgrounds for kids. There are 5 parks in this neighbourhood, with 7 recreational facilities in total. The average number of facilities per park is 1.
section_summaries.homes: In Victoria Manor - Jennings Gate, there are mostly detached homes. This neighbourhood has a consistent population, with 20% of households having moved within the past 5 years and 5% having moved within the past year. It has mostly newer homes and is mostly owner-occupied.
